positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a cosmic forest meeting a magical mountain landscape. Giant bioluminescent flora casts a soft, ethereal glow on massive, crystalline rock formations. The central element is a crescent moon cradled by two stylized, graceful winged creatures (like stylized celestial foxes or owls), hovering over a meandering river of stardust. Use bold, high-contrast colors: deep indigo, sapphire blue, emerald green, and luminous gold accents. The style should be neo-tribal fantasy art, combining clean linework with detailed, vector-like flat color fills, optimized for apparel printing. The composition must be centered, symmetrical, and scalable for clothing print.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, noise, grain, low quality, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn hands, cartoon, photo, photorealism, messy, dirty, grunge, excessive detail, clutter
